productName: Zoots - Gummies - Ease - CBD 20:1 - Hibiscus Guava Honey
description: Handcrafted sweet tropical guava gummies inspired by old-world confectionery, where bright fruit purée, glossy sugar, and a silky cannabis infusion come together in one irresistible chew. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBD to keep things calm and balanced in a 20:1 ratio. Made to help you relax and find your calm.
